full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #46 (2026-05-29)

PULSE
Health: 0.6521 (B). 1025 wallets, 284 contributors. 82 memos today vs 88 avg. Velocity steady.

FLOW
54 reward payments, 395706 PFT distributed to 18 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (87858 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 3,300 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,300 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (30,400 PFT, avg 6,080/day over 5 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (72 memos). Fastest new contributor: r33kyx...3vFC (10.0 memos/day in 1 days). 16 new wallet(s) this week. 50 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-29): 239 transactions from 36 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
